title: system tests: authfile-exists: minor cleanup
body:
Quick followup to #19348:
 - refactor into table form, for legibility
 - add tests for 'podman kube play' and 'podman run'
 - slightly cleaner message on failure

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
IMO the diff is impossible to review, I recommend just jumping straight to the code: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/472388157f921a10aec8c34120759499db3dfa84/test/system/030-run.bats#L1161

Nice, I had something like this in the back of my head, when writing the original, but could not come up with a nice solution
/lgtm
Thanks. `parse_table` is a pain to use, it always takes me a long time to write each one, and I always have to grep for other examples. High initial cost, but (I hope) much lower maintenance cost.
